title: British Beef and Tomato Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with beef and fresh tomatoes, inspired by British cuisine.
instructions: Heat the dish in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped tomatoes, broth, and ale (if using).
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs (optional).
